summary: Run is stopped with developer blocked by explicit user stop; auditor also cannot read project pipeline_state, so overall state is treated as suspicious but no incident is recommended.

findings.summary: Project pipeline_state.json is missing or unreadable from the auditor context.
findings.why_it_matters: Auditor cannot see project pipeline_state, reducing observability into pipeline health.

findings.summary: Pipeline is stopped and developer is blocked due to explicit user stop.
findings.why_it_matters: Indicates a human-driven stop instead of a system failure; recovery and resumption depend on a future manager decision.
